allow_comments.title: Allow Comments
allow_comments.description: When disabled, comment forms are hidden and new comments are rejected.

require_login.title: Require Login
require_login.description: Only authenticated users may post comments.

allow_anonymous.title: Allow Anonymous Comments
allow_anonymous.description: When login is not required, allow guest name/email comments.

auto_approve.title: Auto-Approve Comments
auto_approve.description: Publish new comments immediately without moderation.
